The '''[[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] Echo Belt''' was a top-of-the-line [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth field generator]] in use shortly after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. For the most part, only the wealthiest (or the most dangerous) had access to it. The [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] may have used one of these during her travels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{C|Mislabeled as Eriadu stealth unit}}
